columns.name: id
columns.description: Internal numeric identifier for the invoice in Invoiced.com.

columns.name: object
columns.description: API object type; always 'invoice' for this sheet.

columns.name: customer
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the customer record (customers.id) that this invoice is billed to.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Optional display name or title for the invoice; often blank in this export.

columns.name: number
columns.description: Human-readable invoice number shown to the customer (e.g., 'INV-0016').

columns.name: autopay
columns.description: Indicates whether this invoice is enrolled in automatic payment collection.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: ISO currency code for the invoice amounts.

columns.name: draft
columns.description: Whether the invoice is still in draft state (not yet issued).

columns.name: closed
columns.description: Whether the invoice has been closed in the billing system.

columns.name: paid
columns.description: Whether the invoice has been fully paid.

columns.name: status
columns.description: High-level invoice status (e.g., paid, voided).

columns.name: attempt_count
columns.description: Number of payment collection attempts made for this invoice.

columns.name: next_payment_attempt
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) for the next scheduled automatic payment attempt, if any.

columns.name: subscription
columns.description: Identifier of the related subscription, when the invoice is generated from a subscription; blank for one-off invoices.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Invoice issue date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch).

columns.name: due_date
columns.description: Invoice due date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch).

columns.name: payment_terms
columns.description: Payment terms applied to the invoice (e.g., NET 60, AutoPay).

columns.name: purchase_order
columns.description: Customer purchase order number associated with this invoice, if provided.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Free-form internal or customer-facing notes on the invoice.

columns.name: subtotal
columns.description: Sum of line item amounts before discounts and taxes, in invoice currency.

columns.name: total
columns.description: Total amount of the invoice after discounts and taxes, in invoice currency.

columns.name: balance
columns.description: Outstanding balance remaining on the invoice. Zero for fully paid invoices.

columns.name: payment_plan
columns.description: Identifier of an associated payment plan, if the invoice is being paid in installments. Often blank.

columns.name: url
columns.description: Public URL to view the invoice in the Invoiced.com customer portal.

columns.name: payment_url
columns.description: Public URL where the customer can pay this invoice online.

columns.name: pdf_url
columns.description: Direct URL to download the invoice PDF.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice record was created in Invoiced.com.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice record was last updated in Invoiced.com.

columns.name: items_json
columns.description: JSON-encoded array of line items on the invoice, including amounts, descriptions, and catalog references.

columns.name: discounts_json
columns.description: JSON-encoded array of discounts applied to the invoice. Often an empty array '[]'.

columns.name: taxes_json
columns.description: JSON-encoded array of tax lines applied to the invoice, including tax amounts and rates.

columns.name: ship_to_json
columns.description: JSON-encoded shipping address or shipping details for the invoice, when present.

columns.name: metadata_json
columns.description: JSON-encoded custom metadata key-value pairs attached to the invoice.
